scenarioName: Show blocked report as a worklist

steps.action: Live Gemini reviewed Show blocked report as a worklist
steps.targetSurface: Markdown report review and CLI evidence review
steps.expectedResult: The ASCII execution sketch should clearly show the blocked state before any dense details, list specific actionable findings (finding code, method, source path, line range, telemetry status, one-line fix route), and allow a product owner to discover the blocker without reading the full method table.
steps.observedResult: Unable to observe the rendered ASCII execution sketch as the `report.md` file was not provided in the evidence surfaces.
